Pricing

Creator plans that scale with your image workflow

Start with free credits, then upgrade when you need more weekly generation capacity and more saved characters.

Free

$0

1,600 credits to start

1 saved character

Good for testing prompts and a first character reference.

Starter

$10

More weekly credits

More saved characters

For solo creators who need a steady image flow.

Pro

$20

Higher weekly credits

Expanded character library

For creators building repeatable visual projects.

Pro Plus

$40

Largest weekly credit pool

Highest character capacity

For teams, frequent testing, and content calendars.

Start free

Included on every tier

No watermarks

Every generated image is delivered without platform watermarks.

Commercial use

Use outputs in commercial work, subject to your rights to inputs and applicable rules.

Clean public output

This creators site is built around clean public examples and creator friendly use cases.

Character references

Save character references and reuse them as your plan allows.

Creator Anime Studio

Anime image creation for creators, campaigns, stories, and visual teams.
